dell optiplex 7050 sff.replacementProduct: Dell OptiPlex 7080 SFF or Dell Pro SFF Plus

dell optiplex 7050.replacementProduct: Dell OptiPlex 7080 or Dell Pro equivalent

dell latitude e6330.notes: Released 2012. EoS est. 2014. EOSL est. 2018. Dell does not publish official client EOL.

dell latitude 5590.notes: Released 2018. EoS est. 2020. EOSL est. 2023. Dell does not publish official client EOL.

dell precision 5530.notes: Released Apr 2018. EoS est. 2020. EOSL est. 2023.

dell precision 770.notes: Legacy tower workstation (circa 2003–2006). Well beyond all support windows.

dell me5024.notes: Active product released ~2021. Dell providing updates as of 2026. No EOL announced.

dell md1220.replacementProduct: Dell PowerVault MD1420 or ME5 series
dell md1220.notes: EOSL Jan 31 2016 per Park Place Technologies; GlobalTPM lists Dec 31 2016.

dell powervault md1220.replacementProduct: Dell PowerVault MD1420 or ME5 series
dell powervault md1220.notes: EOSL confirmed by Park Place Technologies and GlobalTPM.

dell p2717h.notes: 27-inch 1080p. Superseded by P2719H ~2019. Dell does not publish formal monitor EOL dates.

dell p2721q.notes: 27-inch 4K USB-C. Superseded ~2023. Dell does not publish formal monitor EOL dates.

dell p3223de.notes: 31.5-inch QHD USB-C Hub. Released ~2022. Still active.

dell p3225qe.notes: 32-inch 4K USB-C Hub. Released ~2024. Current active product.

dell u2415.notes: 24-inch WUXGA. Dell confirmed 'no longer manufactured' Oct 2021. Replacement: U2421E.

dell u2415b.notes: 24-inch WUXGA (U2415b = regulatory model number). EOL confirmed Oct 2021.

dell u2719d.notes: 27-inch QHD. Released Feb 2019. Superseded by U2722D ~2022.

dell dkmmled185-g01.notes: M1000e chassis LED indicator/KMM module. Follows M1000e lifecycle (EoS 2017, EOSL est. 2023).

dell kmm.notes: Legacy KMM (keyboard/monitor/mouse). No longer for sale per user notes. No official EOL date.

dell pro micro plus.notes: Current micro-form-factor desktop (Intel Core Ultra 200). Released 2025. Active.

hp probook 450 g3.notes: Released 2015–2016. HP does not publish specific laptop EOL dates. EOSL est. 5-6 yrs from release.

hp probook 450 g6.notes: Released 2019. HP does not publish specific laptop EOL dates. EOSL est. ~5 yrs from release.

hp probook 450 g9.notes: Released 2022. Within active support window as of 2026. Succeeded by G10 generation.

hp elitebook folio 9480m.notes: Released 2014. HP does not publish specific laptop EOL dates. EOSL est. ~5 yrs from release.

hp hp probook 450 g6.notes: Released 2019. EOSL est. ~5 yrs from release.

laptop 9480m folio elite book.notes: Released 2014. EOSL est. ~5 yrs from release.

laptop latitude 5590.notes: Released 2018. EOSL est. ~5 yrs from release.

laptop precision 5530.notes: Released Apr 2018. EOSL est. ~5 yrs from release.

laptop precision 770.notes: Legacy tower workstation circa 2003–2006. Well beyond all support.

hp probook 450 g3 probook 450 g3.notes: Released 2015–2016. EOSL est. ~5 yrs from release.

apc smt1500us.notes: Discontinued Jan 9 2022. Replaced by SMT1500CUS (SmartConnect-enabled). Source: Schneider distributor docs.

apc nbrk0570.notes: EOSL Dec 31 2025 per multiple secondary sources. Replacement: NBRK0750 or NetBotz 755.

netbotz nbrk0570.notes: EOSL Dec 31 2025. Replacement: NBRK0750 or NetBotz 755.

apc nbrk0750.notes: Active product. Receiving firmware updates (v5.3.4 in 2024). No EOL announced.

avaya b189.notes: No public EOL date found. Check support.avaya.com for current lifecycle status.

avocent mergepoint unity 2032.notes: Original single-PSU model discontinued. Replaced by DAC (-400) variant. Contact Vertiv for EOSL.

avocent mpu2016.notes: Original single-PSU MPU2016-001 discontinued. Replaced by DAC variant. Contact Vertiv for EOSL.

avocent mpu2032.notes: Original single-PSU MPU2032-001 discontinued. Replaced by DAC variant. Contact Vertiv for EOSL.

samsung uh46f5.notes: Confirmed EOL by DigitalDisplayStore.com. No specific date published by Samsung.

lg 98ls95d-b.notes: Confirmed discontinued. Source: LG official product page; CommercialDisplayWorks.

lg 32bn50u.notes: LG does not publish formal monitor EOL dates. Contact LG for lifecycle status.

lg 32mu59-b.notes: LG does not publish formal monitor EOL dates.

lg 34wq73a.notes: LG does not publish formal monitor EOL dates.

symmetricom s350.notes: Officially end-of-life (last-time-buy notice issued). Company: Symmetricom → Microsemi → Microchip.

symmetricom s650.notes: Active current flagship NTP/PTP time server. No EOL announced. Source: microchip.com.

microchip s650.notes: Active current flagship NTP/PTP time server. No EOL announced.

spectra t50e.notes: Active LTO-9 capable tape library as of 2025–2026. No EOL announced. Source: spectralogic.com.

quantum 3580 h9s.notes: IBM 3580-H9S = TS2290 LTO Ultrium 9 HH SAS drive. GA Dec 2021. No public EOSL date.

general dynamics kg-175x.notes: Active NSA-certified HAIPE encryptor providing 10 Gb/s. No EOL announced. Source: gdmissionsystems.com.

fargo dtc1250e.notes: DTC1250e ribbons being discontinued Mar 31 2026. Printer EOL date not publicly confirmed. Check HID support portal.

belkin f1dn104b-3.notes: Older secure KVM generation. Contact Belkin for lifecycle status.

belkin f1dn208kvm-un-4.notes: Universal 2nd Gen 8-port. Still listed active on belkin.com.

ortel 4111a 950-1750mhz.notes: Legacy RF-over-fiber transmitter. EMCORE acquired Ortel. Contact EMCORE for EOL status.

crown audio dci4x300mx.notes: MX suffix denotes mixer variant. Contact Crown Audio/Harman for specific model status.

clearcube gccube200.notes: Model not found in public ClearCube listings. Contact clearcube.com/support for lifecycle.

safenet g150.notes: Legacy government HSM appliance. May follow Luna SA Gov EOS (Dec 2021) / EOL (Dec 2023). Verify with Thales TCT.

middle atlantic mda-td2.replacementProduct: Middle Atlantic UD Series utility drawers
middle atlantic mda-td2.notes: 2U rack drawer. TD2 product line still available from Legrand AV. Contact for MDA-specific status.

data security db4000.notes: Specialized HDD destruction device. Contact manufacturer for lifecycle status.

data security hd-5t.notes: Specialized degausser. Contact manufacturer for lifecycle status.

data security ssmd-2mm.notes: Specialized media destruction device. Contact manufacturer for lifecycle status.

forte forte ai biamp.notes: Digital signal processor. Contact Biamp (biamp.com) for lifecycle information.

room kit plus w/codec plus quad camera a.notes: EoS Apr 2025. LDOS Apr 2030. Source: Cisco EoL notice.
